leadText: The Reaper Cloth (Japanese: れいかいのぬの Spirit World Cloth) is a type of held item introduced in Generation IV. It allows Dusclops to evolve into Dusknoir.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Held item [ edit | edit source ] Causes Dusclops to evolve into Dusknoir when traded while holding it. This consumes the Reaper Cloth. In Pokémon Legends: Arceus , due to the absence of held items, the Reaper Cloth simply needs to be used on Dusclops to trigger the Evolution.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] If the player offers both a Link Cable and Reaper Cloth at Luminous Spring , Dusclops can be evolved into Dusknoir . This consumes the Link Cable and Reaper Cloth. If thrown, it will deal 1 damage (2 if sticky ). Using this item in a dungeon will consume it, with no effect.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description D P Pt HG SS B W B2 W2 A cloth imbued with horrifyingly strong spiritual energy. It is loved by a certain Pokémon. sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD T D S An eerie cloth imbued with horrifyingly strong spiritual energy. It allows a certain kind of Pokémon to evolve.
